description.en: A number indicating the total time, in seconds, that has elapsed between sending STUN requests and receiving responses to them, for all such requests made to date on this candidate pair. This includes both connectivity check and consent check requests. You can compute the average round trip time (RTT) by dividing this value byresponsesReceived.
